Name: Eastman Router EER 812N Speed 21000 RPM Woodworking Dual Bit Capacity Precision Grooving Edging
Description: HIGH-PERFORMANCE MOTOR: Features a robust 1200W Rated Input Power motor designed to handle tough hardwoods and continuous operation without stalling. SUPERIOR RPM SPEED: Delivers a high-velocity No Load Speed of 21000 RPM, providing smooth, professional-grade finishes on edges, grooves, and decorative patterns. DUAL COLLET CAPACITY: uniquely engineered with 8 & 12 mm Bits capacity, giving you the flexibility to use a wider range of router bits for diverse woodworking applications. STABLE OPERATION: Built with a Net Weight of 4.20 kg, the solid construction absorbs vibration, ensuring steady handling and precise control over the workpiece. STANDARD POWER SUPPLY: Designed for standard workshop setups with a Rated Voltage of 230V, making it a reliable plug-and-play tool for construction and cabinetry. › See more product details
